name: ANTHEM metformin aging study
summary: A completed phase 3 randomized ANTHEM trial testing 12 weeks of metformin or placebo in adults without chronic disease, stratified by baseline insulin sensitivity, with insulin-sensitivity, mitochondrial-function, glucose-regulation, and aging-biomarker endpoints.
population: Adults aged 40 to 75 years, free of chronic disease, stratified by insulin-sensitive or insulin-resistant baseline status

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry record listed completion on Mar. 12, 2025 and no posted results as of its Apr. 23, 2026 update.
trial_details.horizon_note: Worth watching because metformin has direct aging-biomarker endpoints here, but no posted result is available in this record.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results could make the metformin aging-biomarker discussion more concrete in adults without chronic disease.
